scripts.test: npm run test -w @yapzi/server && npm run test -w @yapzi/shared
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @yapzi/shared && concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @yapzi/web" "npm run dev -w @yapzi/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @yapzi/shared && npm run build -w @yapzi/server && npm run build -w @yapzi/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @yapzi/web && npm run lint -w @yapzi/server && npm run lint -w @yapzi/shared
